record.field: Request for Subscription Dates Entry - Data Hut Managed Services

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},

Kindly fill out the start and end dates of the product subscription in the cost sheet column - MS TAB.

Info

  • Cost Sheet No: ${object.number}
  • Cost Sheet Name: ${object.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You
Request for Subscription Dates Entry - Data Hut Managed Services

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},

Kindly fill out the start and end dates of the product subscription in the cost sheet column - MS TAB.

Info

  • Cost Sheet No: ${object.number}

Subscription Expiry Reminder 30 Days - Data Hut Managed Services

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},

This is a reminder regarding the expiry of Data Hut managed services. The service will expire after 30 days. Please take the required actions. If already renewed, please ignore this email.

Info

  • Cost Sheet No: ${object.number}
  • Cost Sheet Name: ${object.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=od.cost.sheet&menu_id=791&action=1012

Thank You

Dear ${object.reviewed_id.name},
